Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild normocytic, normochromic anemia (slightly low erythrocytes and hemoglobin) with normal leukocyte and platelet counts. Platelet distribution width is elevated, which may indicate increased platelet size variability, possibly due to reactive or regenerative processes. No acute hematological abnormalities are evident, but anemia should be monitored and further evaluated if clinically indicated.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
